Disputes: you can dispute a lead within 2 US business days of it being accepted. After that window the Dispute button is disabled — leads aren't held open indefinitely, so please review and flag anything incorrect promptly. Feedback has no time limit and isn't a formal dispute — use it for general comments on any lead.
No leads match your search yet.
The qualification criteria for your assigned campaign(s). You can propose edits — an Owner/Admin reviews and approves before they take effect.
No campaign guide has been shared with you yet — ask your account manager to grant access.
Every dispute and feedback thread you've opened on your leads. Reply while a thread is still open — our team closes it once it's resolved.
No disputes or feedback yet — use "Dispute this lead" or "Have a feedback" on a lead in My Leads.

A ticket our team thinks may be worth your time — property/deal details only, no seller contact info yet. Say Yes and we'll get a recording attached and move it into your Leads tab; say No and it's closed out on our end.
